hero.headline: Building Web Development Experts
hero.subheadline: Custom corporate training, public web development courses, and bespoke software solutions. Based in Romania, serving clients globally.

intro.title: Who We Are
intro.text: IM Trainer SRL is a Romanian company with solid experience in IT training and software development. We work with companies and professionals to turn theoretical knowledge into practical, production-ready skills. From introductory courses to advanced programs for technical teams, we tailor every program to the client's real needs.

services.title: What We Offer
services.subtitle: From corporate training to complete web applications — your trusted partner in the IT world.

udemy.title: Become a Web Developer from Scratch
udemy.description: A complete step-by-step guide through HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Git, and practical projects. Recommended for beginners and developers who want to strengthen their foundations.

items.quote: The course exceeded my expectations. Practical content, well-structured, and a passionate trainer.

meta.title: About IM Trainer SRL — IT Training & Software Development
meta.description: Learn more about IM Trainer SRL, our experience in IT training, and the values that guide us.

hero.title: About IM Trainer SRL
hero.subtitle: Passion for education and technology. Solid experience in corporate IT training, public web development courses, and software development.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: IM Trainer SRL was born out of a passion for education and the belief that web technology should be accessible to everyone. We have built practical curricula, taught in classrooms and online, and helped hundreds of learners make the leap into an IT career.
story.p2: Our experience spans large companies and SMEs, courses delivered in Romanian and English, groups with varying technical backgrounds — from backend developers to entrepreneurs wanting to better understand the digital world. Whatever the level or context, our approach remains the same: practical, clear, and results-oriented.

item1.title: Practice over theory
item1.description: Every concept is grounded in a real example or concrete project. Participants leave with working code, not just notes.

item2.title: Tailored to the audience
item2.description: There is no one-size-fits-all course. We adapt the content, pace, and examples to the level and context of each group.

item3.title: Quality over quantity
item3.description: We prefer to cover fewer topics in depth than to rush through everything. Deep understanding beats a checklist.

skills.title: Technologies & Skills
skills.subtitle: Our curriculum covers the entire modern web development ecosystem.

meta.title: Services — IM Trainer SRL
meta.description: Corporate training, public web development courses, custom software development, and IT consulting.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: Complete IT training and software development solutions, tailored to your company's needs.

corporate.title: Corporate IT Training
corporate.description: Custom training programs for your company's teams. We deliver web development courses adapted to the skill level and technical context of participants — from introductory HTML/CSS/JS to modern React architectures.
features: Curriculum tailored to your team's needs
Courses for developers with non-web backgrounds

public.title: Public Web Development Courses
public.description: Open courses for anyone who wants to build a career in web development or strengthen existing skills. From zero to employable — or from practitioner to expert.

software.title: Software & Website Development
software.description: We build custom web applications and presentation websites tailored to your needs and budget. From an elegant presentation site to a complex web application — we deliver functional, performant, and maintainable solutions.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.description: We provide technical guidance for teams and projects. Code reviews, architecture reviews, modern web development best practices — we help teams work better and more efficiently.

udemy.title: Udemy Course: Become a Web Developer from Scratch
udemy.description: A complete step-by-step guide for anyone who wants to start in web development. Covers HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Git, flexbox, grid, DOM, events, and practical projects.

cta.title: Not sure what you need?
cta.subtitle: Contact us and we'll discuss it together. We'll propose the right solution for you or your team.

meta.title: Clients & Partners — IM Trainer SRL
meta.description: Companies we have worked with: FastTrackIT, Transilvania IT, Broadridge. Experience in corporate training and public courses.

hero.title: Clients & Partners
hero.subtitle: We have collaborated with companies in Romania and internationally, delivering quality training programs for hundreds of participants.

fasttrackit.description: A strong collaboration with FastTrackIT — one of Romania's most recognised IT training companies. We were part of the founding trainer team, delivering web development courses both in-classroom and online. The curriculum covers HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and practical projects for learners starting their IT journey.
fasttrackit.detail1: Introductory and advanced web development courses
fasttrackit.detail3: Involved from the company's early years

transilvaniait.description: Collaboration with Transilvania IT on the development and delivery of web development courses aimed at Romanian SMEs. The programs covered both introductory and advanced levels, with a focus on practical applicability for entrepreneurs and small teams.
transilvaniait.detail1: Introductory and advanced web courses for SMEs
transilvaniait.detail2: Tailored to the needs of entrepreneurs and small teams

broadridge.description: Internal training for Broadridge (formerly itiviti) teams — multiple groups of employees with varied technical backgrounds (backend developers, systems engineers etc.) seeking to deepen their web development knowledge. Courses were delivered in both Romanian and English, with content adapted for experienced non-web developers.
broadridge.detail3: Tailored for developers with a different technical background
